falt 31 31q71, 2008 -1.31-1. 2824(31), f7.rafT. 1 fC-1:111, 2008 MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 31st March, 2010 S.O. 727(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) of Section 14 of the Administrative Tribunals Act, 1985 (13 of 1985) hereafter referred to as, said Act, the Central Government hereby specifies the 15th day of April, 2010 as the date on and from which the provisions of sub-section (3) of Section 14 of the said Act shall apply to the Organisations mentioned below, being the Societies and Statutory' Organisations owned or controlled by the Government and makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions (Department of Personnel and Training) number G.S.R. 730(E), dated 2nd day of May, 1986, namely :— -- 2 of 3 -- I I —mss 3(i i)] 1-T17 T1 •041 1171 : 3-71T41771. 3 In the Schedule to the said notification, after serial number 191 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and entries shall respectively be added, namely :— S.No. Name of the Colporation or Society or Other Status Authority ( 1 ) (2) (3) National Human Rights Commission Software Technology Parks of India (STPI) Centre for Materials for ElectroniCs Technology (C-MET) Department of Electronics Accredited Computer Courses Society (DOEACC) 1%. Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (C-DAC) Society for Applied Microwave Electronics Engineering & Research (SAMEER) National Council of Science Museums (NCSM) Lalit Kala Akademi Salar Jung Museum Steel Authority of India (SAIL) • State Council of Educational Research & Training Autonomous Statutory Organization under the Ministry of Home Affairs Scientific Society under the Ministry of Communications and Information Technology Scientific Society under the Ministry of Communications and Information Technology Autonomous Scientific Society under the Ministry of Communications and Information Technology Registered Society under the Ministry of Communications and Information Technology Autonomous Scientific Society under the Ministry of Com- munications and Information Technology Autonomous Body under the Ministry of Culture Autonomous Body under the Ministry of Culture Statutory Body under the Museum Act, under the Ministry of Culture Compaify registered under Companies Act, 1956 under the Ministry of Steel Autonomous Organisation under the Government of National Capital Territory, Delhi. [F.No. P-13030/1/2009-AT] RAJEEV KAPOOR, ft. Secy. Note : The Principal notification was published in the Gazette of India vide number G.S.R. 730(E), dated the 2nd day of May, 1986 and subsequently amended vide the following notifications :— G.S.
